heading_path: 质点动力学基础 / 惯性与惯性系
masked_text:
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00385:14b656bf3d1c]]
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00386:ff2eb9e78880]]{solution}
题目问的是[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00387:558149d9777b]]{重力}的冲量，不是合力冲量。重力大小和方向都恒定，所以只需要把运动半周所用的时间乘进去。
 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00388:86b473fec64b]] 根据动量定理，合力的冲量等于摆球动量的改变量： [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00389:0f7859fc0508]] 运动半周后，摆球到达圆周的对称点，其速度方向刚好反向，变为沿 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00390:22bf003d6cac]] 轴负方向，即 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00391:b70f2751afac]]。代入动量定理可得合力冲量矢量为：[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00392:7ac1f8734fe1]]因此，摆球运动半周内所受合力冲量的大小为：[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00393:0fe671485b43]]
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00394:06b3847e1b6f]]{solution}


[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00395:aa98f082ba60]]
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00396:ff2eb9e78880]]{solution}
根据牛顿第二定律，
 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00397:ea5c5d5e2180]] 
先对速度积分：
 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00398:0cc7fe91d6e8]] 
再由 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00399:4758514ed33c]] 和 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00400:f6e82d3105ad]]，
 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00401:8f905648f56e]] 
故质点位置与时间的关系为
 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00402:bd34f2ba5547]] 
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00403:06b3847e1b6f]]{solution}
read_only_context_before:
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00370:2311fd229bc5]]
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00371:ff2eb9e78880]]{solution}
 原来的 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00372:4d70b4ed9094]] 不是单纯给绳子一个 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00373:4bcb794b06ae]] 的拉力，它自己也要被加速，所以绳中张力小于 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00374:4bcb794b06ae]]。改成外加恒力后，绳端拉力直接等于 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00375:4bcb794b06ae]]，效果会更强。轻滑轮两侧张力相等，设 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00376:4d70b4ed9094]] 向下、[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00377:b6ede97b5ef6]] 向上为正，
 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00378:5e265413904b]] 
绳端受恒力 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00379:179f42113b27]]，轻绳中张力为[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00380:4f6921af5fa4]]，对 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00381:b6ede97b5ef6]]：
 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00382:1a9cea061219]] 
比较得
 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00383:d840477602e3]] 
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00384:06b3847e1b6f]]{solution}
